title: Greek Pilaf Pie
description: A crispy and savory pie filled with fluffy pilaf, perfect for a satisfying Greek meal.
instructions: Thaw filo dough according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine cooked fluffy rice, Greek pilaf mix, and salt. Mix well.
Brush the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish with olive oil.
Place 1 sheet of filo dough in the baking dish, brushing with olive oil.
Repeat step 5 with remaining filo dough, brushing each sheet with olive oil.
Spoon the pilaf mixture into the baking dish, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Fold the filo dough over the pilaf, tucking the edges under the pie.
Brush the top of the pie with olive oil.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the filo is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
